invariant: This registry is data only. Rendering is projection; receipt/validation remains authority.
source: Uploaded PDF: List of regular polytopes; plus OMI configuration witness notes already present in project files.

renderContract.name: display label
renderContract.family: true means generator template, not a finite enumerated object
renderContract.finite: false means do not expect bounded vertex list

polytopes.name: p-gon
polytopes.notes: Infinite family of convex regular polygons where p >= 3.

polytopes.name: n-simplex
polytopes.notes: One of the three convex regular families for n >= 5.

polytopes.name: n-cube / hypercube
polytopes.notes: One of the three convex regular families for n >= 5.

polytopes.name: n-orthoplex / cross-polytope
polytopes.notes: One of the three convex regular families for n >= 5.

polytopes.name: Mucube
polytopes.notes: Regular skew apeirohedron in Euclidean 3-space with planar faces.

polytopes.name: Muoctahedron
polytopes.notes: Regular skew apeirohedron in Euclidean 3-space with planar faces.

polytopes.name: Mutetrahedron
polytopes.notes: Regular skew apeirohedron in Euclidean 3-space with planar faces.

polytopes.name: Regular skew apeirohedra in Euclidean 3-space
polytopes.notes: 30 regular apeirohedra in Euclidean 3-space including 18 pure and 12 blended.

polytopes.name: Regular skew apeirohedra in hyperbolic 3-space
polytopes.notes: 31 regular skew apeirohedra with convex faces in hyperbolic 3-space.
